hooks.command: node -e "const i=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8'));const t=i.tool_input||{};const p=t.file_path||t.path||'';const hardBlocked=[/(^|[\\\\\/])\.env\.production$/i,/k8s[\\\\\/].*secrets?\.ya?ml$/i,/\.pem$/i];const hit=hardBlocked.find(r=>r.test(p));if(hit){console.error('Refusing to write to '+p+' (matches '+hit+'). Production secrets must never be edited by Claude.');process.exit(2)}"

node -e "const i=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8'));const c=(i.tool_input&&i.tool_input.command)||'';if(/git\s+add\s+(-A|-a|--all|\.)(?:\s|$)/.test(c)){console.error('Avoid git add -A/. — stage files by name to avoid sweeping in gitignored secrets or debug scripts.');process.exit(2)}"

node -e "console.log('Repo notes: production deploys via GitHub Actions → ArgoCD (do not edit k8s/*/deployment.yaml image tags or run redeploy.ps1). Frontend type-check is npm run build:check (npm run build skips tsc). Product scope is locked by agent.md — no POS/CRM/payments/delivery features.')"
